---
title: "Review your work"
---

After coding, use ACE to check the work and prepare exports.

## Check the project

Before exporting, scan:

- sources with no codes
- codes that were rarely used
- passages with unexpected codes
- source notes that need follow-up

Use [Review coded text](user-guide/audit.qmd) to inspect every excerpt for one code across the project.

If the examples show that a code name or definition needs tightening, switch to **Edit code details** from the review view and update the dictionary entry before exporting.

## Compare coders

Use agreement when two or more coders worked on the same source set.

Agreement helps you find codes that need discussion. It is not a replacement for reading examples together.

## Export when ready

Export annotations, codebooks, notes, or agreement data when the project is ready for analysis outside ACE.

## Detailed pages

- [Review coded text](user-guide/audit.qmd)
- [Agreement](user-guide/agreement.qmd)
- [Export data](user-guide/export.qmd)
